---
title: "About"
---

## Facilitator

**Dr. Abhijit P. Pakhare, MD**

Professor, Community and Family Medicine, AIIMS Bhopal. Principal Investigator, Regional Resource Centre for Health Technology Assessment (RRC-HTA), AIIMS Bhopal.

## Workshop

**Event:** HTA Interpretation Workshop, IGGMC Nagpur
**Dates:** February 24-25, 2026
**Session:** Day 1, 2:00 PM - 2:45 PM

Organised by HTARC (ICMR-NITVAR, Pune) and IGGMC Nagpur, with support from the Department of Health Research, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India.



---

**Contact:** [hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in](mailto:hta@aiimsbhopal.edu.in)
